---
title: "3/20 2026"
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    code_folding: hide
    toc: true
date: "2026-03-20"
---


```{r, echo=F, message=F, warning=F, results=F}
library(rprojroot)
root <- rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file()
source(file.path(root, "analysis/Rfunctions.R"))
root <- rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file()

```



## main analysis

[here is the main analysis](https://han16.github.io/Collaborations/2022_Oct1_Ajitesh.html)







## Bland–Altman analysis 

[link to BA analysis](2026_0303_Arndt_bland_altman_analysis.html)
